curriculum_filter: failure-conditioned DCA plus security-CFC hard-but-solvable filtering
runtime_governor: evidence-constrained hard gate plus soft robust ranking

evaluation_controls.AgentGuard-Zero-Train+Random-K: same trained VDA and K candidates; seeded random candidate
evaluation_controls.AgentGuard-Zero-Train+Generic-Best-of-K: same trained VDA and K candidates; generic candidate score
evaluation_controls.AgentGuard-Zero-Train+Soft-V5-C: same trained VDA and K candidates; V5-C soft score without hard admission

formal_systems.AgentGuard-Zero-Select: Frozen Qwen + Defender State Layer + V5-C Evidence-Constrained Runtime Governor
formal_systems.AgentGuard-Zero-Full: VDA_3 + Defender State Layer + V5-C Evidence-Constrained Runtime Governor
